'''Trodos''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] and one of the co-directors of the [[Stark Commercial Combine]]. Alongside fellow co-director [[Lom Portom]], he led the Stark Collective forces in the [[Fifth Battle of Qotile]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. During the battle, Trodos was trapped with his troops in a cave and devoured by [[challat eater]]s.
